name: Paul Specht
abstract: Paul Specht (March 24, 1895 – April 11, 1954) was an American dance bandleader popular in the 1920s.

concerts.label: Benefit: American Committee for Relief of German Children

about_quotes.speaker: Sam Wooding
about_quotes.evidence: I can get Paul Whiteman or Paul Specht to play that... The same as Paul Specht or Paul Whiteman would do.

about_quotes.speaker: Artie Shaw
about_quotes.evidence: Paul Specht would get a band together... I’ll tell you who else I worked with every once in a while
about_quotes.doc_title: Artie Shaw — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Edwin "Squirrel" Ashcraft
about_quotes.evidence: As far as bands were concerned, we heard lots of them, like the Happy Six, Paul Specht.
